toast.source: 'The Brewhouse Santa Barbara - 229 West Montecito Street - Wednesday, June 24' DETAILED Daily Performance Summary (freshest Toast at the Fri Jun 26 4 AM Gmail run). Thu Jun 25 summary not delivered yet.

Strong day, ~1/3 up vs last Wed.
